name: Trust Wallet Agent Kit
description: Infrastructure enabling AI agents to execute real crypto transactions across 25+ blockchains while maintaining user control. Agents can propose and execute transactions within user-defined permissions. Integrates with Model Context Protocol (MCP) and available via CLI.
capabilities: Read-only access to crypto positions and data
WalletConnect integration for user's existing wallets
Dedicated AI agent wallet with pre-configured permissions
auth: WalletConnect for existing wallets; dedicated agent wallet with user-configured permissions
notes: Launched 2026. Supports two modes: dedicated agent wallet (preconfigured permissions, no per-transaction approval) and direct user wallet connection (agents propose actions). Trust Wallet has 220M+ downloads. Expected Agent Marketplace launch later 2026.
